assets.caption: Global Settings Panel opened from sidebar gear icon

scenario.title: Global settings panel (deliberately thin)
steps: Verify sidebar footer has gear icon
Click gear to open settings drawer
Verify all 5 settings rows are present
Verify Dark theme is the active segment

assertions.description: The sidebar footer contains a settings gear icon
Clicking the gear icon opens the settings drawer
The settings panel contains all 5 settings rows
Theme setting shows Dark as the active segment
Closing the settings drawer hides it

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence
### Global settings panel (deliberately thin)

![Global Settings Panel opened from sidebar gear icon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/42a683589f6f5caaeadb977768967be8a79c0c32/openspec/changes/gh-166-global-settings-panel/evidence/01-settings-panel-open.webp)

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. Verify sidebar footer has gear icon
2. Click gear to open settings drawer
3. Verify all 5 settings rows are present
4. Verify Dark theme is the active segment
5. Verify notification mute toggle exists
6. Close the settings drawer

</details>
